reasoning: Fallback Expert analysis: XGBoost is leading. Suggesting ensemble of top models, LightGBM HPO, and feature space tuning.

propuestas.descripcion: Weighted Ensemble of best XGBoost and LightGBM models
propuestas.evidencia: XGBoost and LightGBM are both beating the baseline. Ensembling them should yield further MAE reductions.

propuestas.descripcion: Reduce selected features to top 15 using Mutual Info
propuestas.evidencia: Reducing the feature count from 20 to 15 can reduce overfitting, especially in tree-based models.
LightGBM was previously run with fewer trials. 100 trials of HPO could close the gap to XGBoost.

propuestas.descripcion: Expand rolling windows to include larger horizons (e.g. 24, 48)
propuestas.evidencia: Adding longer rolling averages will capture longer-term trends in the series.
